title: きっとくる、未来のために

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Next up is... Um... What was it again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's another day off, and as I'm out for a walk, I spot Special Week.
She has a troubled expression on her her face, so I decide to head
her way for a quick chat.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Right now, I'm practicing how to be a tour guide!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, my mom is coming down to visit me. She said she wanted to see
how I'm doing at school!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I wanted to give her a quick tour of the area. I have to look like I
know my way around!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I've been practicing...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I still haven't gotten the hang of it, haha... Sigh...
choice_data_list: I can help if you want.
I can help if you want.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: R-really?! That'd be great!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
In that case, can you pretend to be my mom? That way, it'll be closer
to the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! You're my mom for today—my one-day mom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Special Week's Special Tour begins with an interesting start.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I think it's this way. Actually, it might've been that way. Yeah, I
think that's it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
D-don't worry! According to my phone, the mall should be straight
ahead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, I know where we are! I was so focused on the map that I
didn't notice anything else!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I come here pretty often!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This area's really quiet, so it's the perfect place to hide away and
relax!
choice_data_list: This is one of your favorite spots, huh?
This is one of your favorite spots, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yep! Even if it's nothing like what you'd see back in Hokkaido.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Being here reminds me of the fact that, despite being so far from
home, my mom and I live under the same sky.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thinking of her motivates me to put my all into my life here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And afterwards, on the way back, I stop by the market. They make
the most amazing pickled veggies. They're sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: C'mon, this way! There's actually a shortcut we can take to get there!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't Spe! Are you here for the usual?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes, please! Two jars of your special pickled veggies!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... The pickled veggies here are perfect—a balanced mix of
sweet and acidic, all while staying super crunchy! "Special" hardly
even covers it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Actually, speaking of "special"...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! Have a cup of my specially-mixed juice!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I made this over at the drink fountain using my patented mixing
method! As for the taste, well... give it a sip and find out for
yourself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She places the glass of brown liquid on the table. As I look at the
peculiar concoction, a slew of words come to mind, but "juice" is not
one of them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I always make sure to throw one of these together whenever I come
here to study with El and the others!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: If one of us nods off or gets a problem wrong, we have to take a sip!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm usually the one who ends up drinking most of it though...
Hahaha...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This juice tastes just like how you would imagine! It makes you go "Blegh!" But I kinda like it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It contains all the joy, laughter, and excitement that fills this room
whenever we're here. It's special like that.
choice_data_list: Well, I can't say no to that, now can I?
Well, I can't say no to that, now can I?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! Down the hatch it goes! I'll order a carrot hamburger
steak to help get the taste out of your mouth afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They taste a bit different from the ones my mom makes, but not in a
bad way! Each bite packs its own punch!
choice_data_list: I can't wait to try it!
I can't wait to try it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I think I'll order one for myself too! ♪ Excuse me! Two carrot
hamburger steaks, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our brief lunch break, Special Week continues to show me
around town.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm-hm-hmmm. ♪ It's already evening, huh? I guess we should start
heading ba—wait...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhgh?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I totally forgot about the tour! We were supposed to go to the
landmark locations, but we ended up going to all my usual spots!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It must've slipped my mind somehow... What do I do?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom said she wanted to see how I'm doing here... She would've
been so disappointed by my tour...
choice_data_list:
If that was your goal, I think it was a perfect
tour.

If that was your goal, I think it was a perfect
tour.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: B-but... we didn't even get to go to the mall or see the river...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be good if she knew that I was visiting places unique to
this area...
choice_data_list: She'd be more than relieved if she saw you now.
She'd be more than relieved if she saw you now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I think I get it. When I first came here, I couldn't tell left from
right. But now I know enough to find my way around town!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! I was missing the point this whole time. Thank you for
helping me realize that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna give my mom a tour only I could ever give! She'll
be happy for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Gurgle...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eep! My stomach... I relaxed too quickly... Ha... haha...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Oh, right! Since we're already out, do you mind if we stop by
one last place?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go to my favorite ramen shop! They give you gargantuan
servings!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Their "Super Gargantuan XXL Ramen" is really famous! The
bowl's bigger than my head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Anyway, hurry up! Let's get going already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Special Week eats any more than she already has, it might start to
affect her running. I hurriedly follow behind her to make sure she's
kept in check.
